# Generated by telegram-api-generator. Do not edit manually.

set(ROOT_HEADERS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/EventBroadcaster.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/EventHandler.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Bot.cpp
)

list(APPEND TGBOT_SOURCES ${ROOT_HEADERS})
set(TGBOT_SOURCES "${TGBOT_SOURCES}" PARENT_SCOPE)

add_subdirectory(types)
add_subdirectory(requests)
add_subdirectory(tools)
add_subdirectory(net)
